titleStmt.title: SII 20.91: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 91. (B.K. No. 17 of 1936-37.) CHAṬṬARKI, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in front of the Hanumān temple.

summary.p: The date portion, except the mention of Sunday, is lost in this damaged record.

The inscription states that Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Gōvaṇadēvarasa attacked the sarvanamasya-agrahāra Cheṭṭurage, while administering the country in conjunction with twelve nāyakas from his capital at Kannavaḷḷi; killed the dāyādas there and established his uninterrupted rule. It records a gift of income from taxes due to his family, i.e. Seḷara-kula, from that village to the mahājanas of that place. Gōvaṇadēvarasa is mentioned as the servant of Jagadēkamalla.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© © Ōṁ jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhi
tārṇavaṁ . dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgravi
śrāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . svastisamastabhuva
nāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja
paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷati
ḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalla
dēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamā
namācaṁ
badly worn out
divāradaṁdu svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda mahā
maṁḍaḷēśvara kopaṇapuravarādhīśvaraṁ suvarṇnagaruḍa
dhvajaṁ virōdhimaṁḍaḷika nāna
yapada seḷaṟaku
ḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍa kadanapracaṁḍa kātyā
yanīlabdhavarapraśādaṁ mrigamadāmōda manne
ya vallabha bhayalōbhadurlabha sanivārasiddhi
kuśāgrabuddhiyaṇnanasiṁga sāhasōttuṁgavardha
dhvaja rājamāṁdhātaṁ satyarādhēya sauryya
gāṁgēya patihitavainatēyanahitamaṁneya ba
ppanaṁkakāṟa śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvapādārādhakaṁ parabaḷasā
dhakaṁ nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍa
ḷēśvaraṁ gōvaṇadēvarasaruṁ yindharasaruṁ satyarasaruṁ tamma
gōṇarasanuṁ sadahurada Iṁndarasanuṁ masuvattiya
Iṁdara sanuṁ paṁnnirvvarnnāyakaruverasu rājadhāni kannaThe letter 'ra' is written above the line.
vaḷḷiyal sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamiṟdu kāraṇāṁta
radi dāyigaralu kādutaṁ baṁdu ś®matsarvvanamaśyadagrahā
raṁ ceṭṭurageyaṁ kokku dāyādyaraṁ geldu yaśēṣamahā
janaṁgaḷge nimmartthamaṁ prāṇamumanikki Emmaṁ rājyadalu nili
sidireṁdu sakāruṇyaṁgeydu taṁmma seḷaṟakulada maneya
saṁtavaṇa Āyadāya kāṇike koladeṟe kuṟideṟe
samastakoḷḷi Innu huṭṭuva saṁtavaṇa Iṁtinitu samastāyavellama
hugadaṁtāgi holegeṟe māḍi sarvvanamasyavāgi dhārāpū
rvvakavāgi biṭṭa ś®matu gōvaṇadēva koṭṭa śiḷāsāsana I dharmmava
pratipāḷisidavaru vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradalu hattusā
yira kavileyaṁ sahiraṁṇyasahitaṁ dānaṁ māḍida phaḷa I dharmmakkā
giyu Aṁnyāyamaṁ ciṁtisidavaṁ vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradalu
hattusāyira kavileyu brāhmaṇaruvaṁ vadhiyisida dōśa .
© bahubhirvasudhā dattaṁ . rājabhi sagarādibhi yaśya yasya ya
dā bhūmi tasya tasya yadā phaḷaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harē
ti vasuṁdhara śaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi (yi)viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
dātā caiva na dātabyaṁ dātabyaṁ pratiśēdhakaṁ dattasya haratē dā
naṁ trayaḥḻpātaka yō nara . Ācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ biṭṭa
datti svasti .
Digital edition of SII 20.91 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
